eventName: U.S. VA Disability Compensation Payment Schedule (2024)
notes: Payments are made on the first business day of the following month. If the first day is a weekend or federal holiday, payment is made on the last business day before the first.

VA disability compensation rate tables are updated annually and are tied to the Social Security COLA; new rates are effective each December 1.

Pilot (Texas): USDA FNS issuance-rule reference. Benefits are made available on specific calendar days each month by case-number grouping.
Pilot (California): USDA FNS issuance-rule reference. Benefits are made available over the first 10 days each month based on the last digit of the case number.
Pilot (Connecticut): DSS changed issuance rules effective March 1, 2026. Jan–Feb use prior last-name rule; Mar–Dec use new Client ID last-2-digits rule (8-day spread).
Phase 5 (Low-volatility expansion): USDA FNS issuance-rule reference. Benefits are made available on the 1st calendar day of each month.

Phase 5 (Low-volatility expansion): USDA FNS issuance-rule reference. Benefits are staggered across 3 calendar days each month based on the last digit of the case number.
Phase 5 (Low-volatility expansion): USDA FNS issuance-rule reference. Benefits are staggered across 3 calendar days each month based on the first letter of the last name.
Phase 5 (Low-volatility expansion): USDA FNS issuance-rule reference. Benefits are staggered across 4 calendar days each month based on the first letter of the last name.
Phase 5 (Low-volatility expansion): USDA FNS issuance-rule reference. Benefits are staggered across 1st–5th based on the 7th digit of the case number; digits 0/6/7/8/9 issue on the 5th.
